trans-unit.resname: A candidate with this name already exists in this season
trans-unit.source: A candidate with this name already exists in this season
trans-unit.target: Er bestaat al een kandidaat met deze naam in dit seizoen

trans-unit.resname: A label with a similar name already exists
trans-unit.source: A label with a similar name already exists
trans-unit.target: Er bestaat al een label met deze naam

trans-unit.resname: A new confirmation email has been sent. Please check your inbox.
trans-unit.source: A new confirmation email has been sent. Please check your inbox.
trans-unit.target: Er is een nieuwe bevestigingsmail verstuurd. Check je inbox.

trans-unit.resname: A quiz with this name already exists in this season
trans-unit.source: A quiz with this name already exists in this season
trans-unit.target: Er bestaat al een test met deze naam in dit seizoen

trans-unit.resname: After changing your email address you will receive a new confirmation email.
trans-unit.source: After changing your email address you will receive a new confirmation email.
trans-unit.target: Na het wijzigen van je e-mailadres ontvang je een nieuwe bevestigingsmail.

trans-unit.resname: Already have an account? Log in
trans-unit.source: Already have an account? Log in
trans-unit.target: Heb je al een account? Log in

trans-unit.resname: Are you sure you want to clear all the results? This will also delete all the eliminations.
trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to clear all the results? This will also delete all the eliminations.
trans-unit.target: Weet je zeker dat je de resultaten wilt leegmaken? Dit gooit ook alle eliminaties weg.

trans-unit.resname: Are you sure you want to delete this candidate? All their answers will be lost.
trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to delete this candidate? All their answers will be lost.
trans-unit.target: Weet je zeker dat je deze kandidaat wilt verwijderen? Alle gegeven antwoorden gaan dan verloren.

trans-unit.resname: Are you sure you want to delete this question from the question bank?
trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to delete this question from the question bank?
trans-unit.target: Weet je zeker dat je deze vraag uit de vragenbank wilt verwijderen?

trans-unit.resname: Are you sure you want to delete this quiz?
trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to delete this quiz?
trans-unit.target: Weet je zeker dat je deze test wilt verwijderen?

trans-unit.resname: Are you sure you want to reset progress for this candidate? Their given answers for this quiz will be deleted.
trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to reset progress for this candidate? Their given answers for this quiz will be deleted.
trans-unit.target: Weet je zeker dat je de voortgang van deze kandidaat wilt resetten? De ingevulde antwoorden voor deze test worden verwijderd.

trans-unit.resname: Confirm your email address to enable this feature.
trans-unit.source: Confirm your email address to enable this feature.
trans-unit.target: Bevestig je e-mailadres om deze functie te kunnen gebruiken.

trans-unit.resname: Confirm your email address to enable this.
trans-unit.source: Confirm your email address to enable this.
trans-unit.target: Bevestig je e-mailadres om dit te gebruiken.

trans-unit.resname: Could not find candidate with name {name}
trans-unit.source: Could not find candidate with name {name}
trans-unit.target: Kon kandidaat met naam {name} niet vinden

trans-unit.resname: Could not find candidate with name {name} in elimination.
trans-unit.source: Could not find candidate with name {name} in elimination.
trans-unit.target: Kon geen kandidaat vinden met de naam {name} in de eliminatie

trans-unit.resname: Could not load releases from GitHub.
trans-unit.source: Could not load releases from GitHub.
trans-unit.target: Kon releases niet laden van GitHub.

trans-unit.resname: Create an empty quiz and add questions from the question bank.
trans-unit.source: Create an empty quiz and add questions from the question bank.
trans-unit.target: Maak een lege quiz aan en voeg vragen toe vanuit de vragenbank.

trans-unit.resname: Deactivate the quiz before undoing the finalization
trans-unit.source: Deactivate the quiz before undoing the finalization
trans-unit.target: Deactiveer de test voordat je het afronden ongedaan maakt

trans-unit.resname: Deleting your account also deletes every season you are the only owner of. This cannot be undone.
trans-unit.source: Deleting your account also deletes every season you are the only owner of. This cannot be undone.
trans-unit.target: Als je je account verwijdert, worden ook alle seizoenen verwijderd waarvan jij de enige eigenaar bent. Dit kan niet ongedaan worden gemaakt.

trans-unit.resname: Download an archive of everything stored under your account: your profile, the seasons you own, their quizzes, results and candidates.
trans-unit.source: Download an archive of everything stored under your account: your profile, the seasons you own, their quizzes, results and candidates.
trans-unit.target: Download een archief met alles wat onder je account is opgeslagen: je profiel, de seizoenen die je bezit, met de bijbehorende testen, resultaten en kandidaten.

trans-unit.resname: Enter your email address, and we will send you a link to reset your password.
trans-unit.source: Enter your email address, and we will send you a link to reset your password.
trans-unit.target: Voer je e-mailadres in en we sturen je een link om je wachtwoord te herstellen.
Fout bij het leegmaken van de test
Fout bij het opslaan van de volgorde

trans-unit.resname: Help text for adding a quiz
trans-unit.source: Help text for adding a quiz
trans-unit.target: Upload een XLSX-bestand met vragen en antwoorden voor je test.
Voeg kandidaten toe aan dit seizoen. Eén naam per regel.

trans-unit.resname: Help text for creating a season
trans-unit.source: Help text for creating a season
trans-unit.target: Maak een nieuw seizoen aan om tests en kandidaten te beheren.
Kies welke kandidaten groen of rood krijgen voor de eliminatie.

trans-unit.resname: If an account matching your email exists, then an email was just sent that contains a link that you can use to reset your password.
trans-unit.source: If an account matching your email exists, then an email was just sent that contains a link that you can use to reset your password.
trans-unit.target: Als er een account met dit e-mailadres bestaat, is er zojuist een e-mail verstuurd met een link om je wachtwoord te herstellen.

trans-unit.resname: If you don't receive an email please check your spam folder or
trans-unit.source: If you don't receive an email please check your spam folder or
trans-unit.target: Als je geen e-mail ontvangt, controleer dan je spammap of

trans-unit.resname: Locks the quiz so it can no longer be edited and makes it ready for candidates to take.
trans-unit.source: Locks the quiz so it can no longer be edited and makes it ready for candidates to take.
trans-unit.target: Vergrendelt de test zodat deze niet meer bewerkt kan worden en maakt deze klaar voor deelnemers.

trans-unit.resname: No questions have been added to this quiz yet.
trans-unit.source: No questions have been added to this quiz yet.
trans-unit.target: Er zijn nog geen vragen aan deze test toegevoegd.

trans-unit.resname: No questions in the question bank yet
trans-unit.source: No questions in the question bank yet
trans-unit.target: Nog geen vragen in de vragenbank

trans-unit.resname: Please confirm your email address before downloading your data.
trans-unit.source: Please confirm your email address before downloading your data.
trans-unit.target: Bevestig eerst je e-mailadres voordat je je gegevens downloadt.

trans-unit.resname: Please confirm your email address before exporting a quiz.
trans-unit.source: Please confirm your email address before exporting a quiz.
trans-unit.target: Bevestig je e-mailadres voordat je een quiz exporteert.

trans-unit.resname: Please confirm your email address before exporting data.
trans-unit.source: Please confirm your email address before exporting data.
trans-unit.target: Bevestig eerst je e-mailadres voordat je gegevens exporteert.

trans-unit.resname: Please upload a valid XLSX file
trans-unit.source: Please upload a valid XLSX file

trans-unit.resname: Question added to the question bank
trans-unit.source: Question added to the question bank

trans-unit.resname: Question removed from the question bank
trans-unit.source: Question removed from the question bank

trans-unit.resname: Quiz cleared and no longer finalized
trans-unit.source: Quiz cleared and no longer finalized
trans-unit.target: Test leeggemaakt en niet langer afgerond

trans-unit.resname: Re-opens the quiz for editing. Candidates will no longer be able to take the quiz until it is finalized again.
trans-unit.source: Re-opens the quiz for editing. Candidates will no longer be able to take the quiz until it is finalized again.
trans-unit.target: Heropent de test voor bewerking. Deelnemers kunnen de test niet meer afnemen totdat deze opnieuw is afgerond.

trans-unit.resname: Refresh the page to try again.
trans-unit.source: Refresh the page to try again.
trans-unit.target: Ververs de pagina om het opnieuw te proberen.

trans-unit.resname: Sync latest changes to this quiz
trans-unit.source: Sync latest changes to this quiz
trans-unit.target: Laatste wijzigingen synchroniseren naar deze quiz

trans-unit.resname: The candidate name must be between 1 and 16 characters
trans-unit.source: The candidate name must be between 1 and 16 characters
trans-unit.target: De naam van de kandidaat moet tussen de 1 en 16 tekens zijn

trans-unit.resname: The confirmation email could not be sent. Please try again later.
trans-unit.source: The confirmation email could not be sent. Please try again later.
trans-unit.target: De bevestigingsmail kon niet worden verzonden. Probeer het later opnieuw.

trans-unit.resname: The confirmation email could not be sent. Please use the resend button to try again.
trans-unit.source: The confirmation email could not be sent. Please use the resend button to try again.
trans-unit.target: De bevestigingsmail kon niet worden verzonden. Gebruik de knop om het opnieuw te proberen.

trans-unit.resname: The question was not synced to finalized quiz(zes): %quizzes%. Use the Sync button to update them.
trans-unit.source: The question was not synced to finalized quiz(zes): %quizzes%. Use the Sync button to update them.
trans-unit.target: De vraag is niet gesynchroniseerd naar afgeronde quiz(zes): %quizzes%. Gebruik de Synchroniseren-knop om ze bij te werken.

trans-unit.resname: The quiz cannot be finalized while it has errors
trans-unit.source: The quiz cannot be finalized while it has errors
trans-unit.target: De test kan niet afgerond worden zolang er fouten zijn

trans-unit.resname: The quiz has already been filled in and can no longer be altered
trans-unit.source: The quiz has already been filled in and can no longer be altered
trans-unit.target: De test is al ingevuld en kan niet meer aangepast worden

trans-unit.resname: The quiz must be finalized before it can be activated
trans-unit.source: The quiz must be finalized before it can be activated
trans-unit.target: De test moet afgerond zijn voordat deze geactiveerd kan worden

trans-unit.resname: The season code is used by candidates to join this season. Regenerating it invalidates the current code, so make sure to share the new one.
trans-unit.source: The season code is used by candidates to join this season. Regenerating it invalidates the current code, so make sure to share the new one.
trans-unit.target: De seizoenscode wordt door kandidaten gebruikt om dit seizoen te vinden. Als je een nieuwe code genereert, werkt de oude niet meer, dus deel de nieuwe code opnieuw.

trans-unit.resname: There are no answers for this question
trans-unit.source: There are no answers for this question
trans-unit.target: Er zijn geen antwoorden voor deze vraag

trans-unit.resname: There is already an account with this email
trans-unit.source: There is already an account with this email
trans-unit.target: Er is al een account met dit e-mailadres

trans-unit.resname: This deletes your account and every season you are the only owner of. Enter your password to confirm.
trans-unit.source: This deletes your account and every season you are the only owner of. Enter your password to confirm.
trans-unit.target: Dit verwijdert je account en alle seizoenen waarvan jij de enige eigenaar bent. Vul je wachtwoord in om te bevestigen.

trans-unit.resname: This invalidates the current season code. Anyone using the old code will no longer be able to join this season.
trans-unit.source: This invalidates the current season code. Anyone using the old code will no longer be able to join this season.
trans-unit.target: Hiermee wordt de huidige seizoenscode ongeldig. Iedereen die de oude code gebruikt, kan dit seizoen niet meer vinden.

trans-unit.resname: This question cannot be deleted because it is used in a locked or active quiz
trans-unit.source: This question cannot be deleted because it is used in a locked or active quiz
trans-unit.target: Deze vraag kan niet verwijderd worden omdat die gebruik wordt in een vergrendelde of actieve test

trans-unit.resname: This question has already been used
trans-unit.source: This question has already been used

trans-unit.resname: This question has been used in a quiz. The copy in the quiz will not be affected.
trans-unit.source: This question has been used in a quiz. The copy in the quiz will not be affected.
trans-unit.target: Deze vraag is gebruikt in een test. De kopie in de test blijft ongewijzigd.

trans-unit.resname: This question is incomplete: it needs at least two answers and exactly one correct answer
trans-unit.source: This question is incomplete: it needs at least two answers and exactly one correct answer
trans-unit.target: Deze vraag is incompleet: er zijn tenminste twee antwoorden en precies één goed antwoord nodig

trans-unit.resname: This quiz can no longer be altered
trans-unit.source: This quiz can no longer be altered
trans-unit.target: Deze test kan niet meer aangepast worden

trans-unit.resname: This quiz has already been filled in and can no longer be altered
trans-unit.source: This quiz has already been filled in and can no longer be altered
trans-unit.target: Deze quiz is al ingevuld en kan niet meer worden gewijzigd

trans-unit.resname: This quiz has no questions yet
trans-unit.source: This quiz has no questions yet
trans-unit.target: Deze test heeft nog geen vragen

trans-unit.resname: Wrong password, your account has not been deleted.
trans-unit.source: Wrong password, your account has not been deleted.
trans-unit.target: Verkeerd wachtwoord, je account is niet verwijderd.

trans-unit.resname: You are not allowed to answer this quiz
trans-unit.source: You are not allowed to answer this quiz
trans-unit.target: Je mag deze test niet beantwoorden
Je kan deze vraag niet beantwoorden

trans-unit.resname: Your email address has been changed.
trans-unit.source: Your email address has been changed.

trans-unit.resname: Your email address has been changed. Please check your inbox to confirm it.
trans-unit.source: Your email address has been changed. Please check your inbox to confirm it.
trans-unit.target: Je e-mailadres is gewijzigd. Check je inbox om het te bevestigen.

trans-unit.resname: Your email address has been verified.
trans-unit.source: Your email address has been verified.

trans-unit.resname: Your email address is already confirmed.
trans-unit.source: Your email address is already confirmed.
